title: agent-toolkit config
description: Plugin-wide configuration for the coding-agent-toolkit opencode plugin. Project config (./.opencode/agent-toolkit.json) overrides user config (~/.config/opencode/agent-toolkit/agent-toolkit.json) at the leaf level.

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON Schema. Editors use this for autocomplete and validation.

openapi.description: OpenAPI / Swagger registry. Maps host:env:spec handles to spec download URLs.

registry.description: host name → environment name → spec name → spec URL. Names must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$ (handles are colon-separated, so colons are reserved).

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: Environments under one logical host (project / platform).
Direct URL (https / http / file) to the OpenAPI / Swagger JSON document. YAML is not supported in this MVP.
